summary: Iter172 Daily Standup Board PDF→LLM Auto-Merge Pipeline + EchoConcierge Phase 2 - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 21/21 tests passed covering standup board CRUD, autofill, PDF ingest with pdfminer.six text extraction (text_chars > 0), Claude Sonnet 4.5 proposal generation, accept merge, publish/send dry-run, section edit/approve lifecycle, and full EchoConcierge Phase 2 regression. Frontend: Daily Standup panel with 14 section cards, AUTO/APPROVED badges, Auto-fill working (3 sections), Edit/Save/Approve buttons functional. EchoConcierge panel with all 6 tabs (Compose/Dining/Rooms/Transport/Celebration/Recovery), dining reservation successful, celebration cascade fired (4 departments), recovery case opened. SolveBar (⌘J) working with Claude LLM returning 95% confidence resolution.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Daily Standup + EchoConcierge Phase 2 features working

seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix (TEST_arrivals_report.pdf, TEST_merge_test.pdf, TEST_John Smith, TEST_Approved Manager, TEST_concierge, TEST_front-office, TEST_AC not working, TEST_Guest reported AC issue)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter172 Daily Standup PDF→LLM auto-merge fully tested. Key new features: (1) PDF ingest with pdfminer.six text extraction now working (text_chars > 0 verified), (2) Claude Sonnet 4.5 proposal generation via /api/standup/ingest/{id}/propose returns proposed_sections with section_id, content, confidence, rationale, (3) Accept merge via /api/standup/ingest/accept now calls _ensure_board first (previously returned board:null), (4) Branded HTML email via /api/standup/send with Georgia headings + gold rules. EchoConcierge Phase 2 regression: all 6 tabs working (Compose/Dining/Rooms/Transport/Celebration/Recovery), dining reserve creates table assignment, celebration compose fires 4-department cascade (pastry/housekeeping/florist/amenity), recovery open creates case. SolveBar (⌘J) LLM integration working with 95% confidence resolution.

mocked_apis_list: /api/standup/send → dry-run when no RESEND_API_KEY (returns status:'dry-run', html_preview_bytes)

backend_passed: GET /api/health - returns healthy
GET /api/standup/today - returns board with today's date + 14 sections_def
GET /api/standup/date/2026-04-19 - returns/creates board for specific date with all 14 section IDs
POST /api/standup/autofill - populates vips_in_house, hours, activities, glitches from live OS collections
POST /api/standup/ingest - accepts PDF upload, pdfminer.six extracts text (text_chars > 0 verified)
POST /api/standup/ingest/{id}/propose - calls Claude Sonnet 4.5, returns proposed_sections with section_id, content, confidence, rationale
POST /api/standup/ingest/accept - merges selected sections into board (now calls _ensure_board first)
POST /api/standup/section - updates content, sets approved=false, edited_by, updated_at
POST /api/standup/section/approve - sets approved=true, approved_by
POST /api/standup/publish - flips status='confirmed', sets confirmed_by, confirmed_at
POST /api/standup/send - returns dry-run with html_preview_bytes when no RESEND_API_KEY
GET /api/concierge-v2/outlets - returns 5+ outlets (regression)
POST /api/concierge-v2/dining/reserve - creates reservation with table assignment (regression)
GET /api/concierge-v2/rooms/upgrades - returns upgrade candidates (regression)
GET /api/concierge-v2/transport/options - returns 9 transport options (regression)
POST /api/concierge-v2/transport/request - creates dispatched request (regression)
POST /api/concierge-v2/celebration/compose - creates cascade with 4 departments (regression)
POST /api/concierge-v2/recovery/open - creates case with status='open' (regression)
GET /api/concierge-v2/ird/amenities - returns 10+ amenities (regression)
GET /api/guest/folio - returns folio with dining, requests, recovery, spend (regression)
POST /api/concierge-v2/solve - returns LLM resolution (regression)

Panel header shows 'The Sailing Yacht · 2026-04-18' with 'MORNING BRIEFING · FRONT OFFICE'
14 section cards rendered with department-color borders (data-testid='standup-section-{id}')
⚡ Auto-fill button (standup-autofill) triggers autofill, message shows 'Auto-filled 3 section(s) from live OS data'
AUTO badges appear on autofilled sections (6 AUTO badges found)
APPROVED badges appear on approved sections
Status pill shows 'CONFIRMED · 2/14 approved'
📄 Ingest PDF button (standup-ingest) present
📨 SEND BRIEFING button present
Edit button → textarea appears (standup-edit-{id})
Cancel button closes edit mode
EchoConcierge panel opens via ⌘K → 'orchestration'
All 6 center-column tabs present: Compose, Dining, Rooms, Transport, Celebration, Recovery
Dining tab: Book a table form with outlet, when, party size, table preference, occasion fields
Dining tab: Reserve button creates booking ('Booked at Atrium Lounge · Table T22')
Dining tab: Dietary warning shown for gluten-free guest
Celebration tab: One click · four departments form with occasion, date, notes
Celebration tab: Compose & fan out creates cascade (Pastry 1, Housekeeping 1, Florist 1, Amenity 1)
Recovery tab: Open a case form with category, severity, description, compensation
Recovery tab: Open recovery case button creates case ('Recovery case opened · Katherine Mansfield')
Mission Control shows requests count, EST revenue, BOOKED revenue
Active Requests queue shows requests with CONFIRM/COMPLETE/CANCEL buttons
SolveBar launcher (⌘J · Solve) present at bottom-left
SolveBar opens with Ctrl+J keyboard shortcut
SolveBar input accepts query, Solve button triggers LLM
SolveBar result shows headline, root_cause, confidence (95% SURE), recommended action, api hint
SolveBar guest line shows polished phrase ('Wonderful choice, Mr. Mansfield...')
SolveBar alternatives section shows backup options
